title: taraxacum psammophilum
intro: Taraxacum psammophilum, also known as sand dandelion, is a species of dandelion that grows in sandy habitats. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, containing flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum psammophilum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver health, making it a potential remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to leverage its medicinal properties.
